overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned, overgrown post-Soviet urban residential area in a video game. The player walks past derelict concrete buildings, abandoned vehicles, and radiation warning signs under a gloomy overcast sky with wet ground reflecting the diffused light.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown courtyard near abandoned concrete building entrance

events.description: emerging from deep shadow of building entrance into slightly brighter tree-covered area

agents.ego_description: walking away from the abandoned building entrance through dense overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: large multi-story Soviet-style panel building with broken windows
covered entranceway with columns leading into the building complex
thick bushes and small trees blocking the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in near-total darkness beside a derelict concrete apartment building. The camera moves forward through a narrow passage framed by the building's entrance archway on the left and dense overgrown vegetation on the right, gradually emerging into a slightly brighter tree-lined path.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with war memorial wall

events.description: turning from tree-lined path onto paved road surface
concrete wall with red painted text '1941-1943' comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: turning onto the main road and walking past a concrete memorial wall with painted dates

notable_agents.action: abandoned car visible in the distance, partially obscured by trees

entered.detail: low concrete wall with red painted dates commemorating the war years
tall curved street light pole along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera turns onto an abandoned road. A concrete memorial wall bearing the dates 1941-1943 appears on the left, while the path ahead reveals wet asphalt and abandoned vehicles in the distance. Street lamps line the road as the environment transitions from enclosed courtyard to open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded abandoned street with derelict vehicles

events.description: passing abandoned van on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt road past abandoned vehicles and street furniture

notable_agents.action: abandoned delivery van covered in dust and overgrown with weeds

entered.detail: small single-story brick building with overgrown roof near a gate
tall apartment blocks visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the rain-slicked asphalt road, passing a derelict van on the right. The environment opens up to reveal distant concrete apartment blocks through the trees. A small abandoned guardhouse becomes visible ahead as the camera continues past street lamps and overgrown sidewalks.

events.description: approaching small abandoned guardhouse with overgrown vegetation on roof

agents.ego_description: walking toward a metal gate and small guardhouse structure

entered.detail: large metal sliding gate blocking the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an abandoned checkpoint area, with a small guardhouse moving from the center of view to the left as the camera passes. A large metal security gate blocks the main road ahead. The ground transitions from asphalt to paved tiles as the camera moves along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted dirt path with radiation warning and barbed wire

events.description: turning right onto dirt path alongside barbed wire fence
yellow radiation hazard warning sign becomes visible on the fence

agents.ego_description: turning onto a dirt path running alongside a barbed wire fence with warning signs

entered.detail: metal fence with multiple strands of barbed wire running along the path
yellow triangular warning sign with radiation symbol attached to fence
pile of corroded metal drums and containers beside the path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a narrow dirt path bordered by a barbed wire fence on the left. A yellow radiation warning sign is prominently displayed on the fence, and rusted metal barrels sit on the right side of the path. The scene suggests entry into a restricted or contaminated zone as the camera continues along the overgrown trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic shadows of a derelict apartment complex into an open, contaminated restricted zone. It begins in near-total darkness beside a concrete building, moving through a narrow passage framed by an archway and dense vegetation before emerging into a brighter, tree-lined path. As the camera turns onto an abandoned road, the environment expands from an enclosed courtyard to an open street featuring a concrete memorial wall and rain-slicked asphalt dotted with abandoned vehicles. The scene then proceeds past a derelict van and street lamps toward a checkpoint, where a small guardhouse shifts to the left as the camera approaches a large metal security gate. Finally, the camera turns right onto a narrow dirt path bordered by a barbed wire fence, passing a yellow radiation warning sign and rusted metal barrels as it enters the overgrown contaminated area.
